name: Acacia Senegal Gum
description: Gum arabic is obtained from the trunk and leaves of different species of African Acacia. In cosmetics, it is used for its film-forming properties. By mixing with water it forms a kind of gel that improves the texture of the products. It is widely used in mascaras and eyeliners to improve their outfit. In toothpaste, it can also have an anti-caries effect as well as sodium fluoride. It is used in food as an additive under the name E414. It is allowed in organic.

description: AACP is a polymer, derived more or less far from plastic. It contains hydrophilic and hydrophobic groups that allow the polymer to bind to both water and oil, allowing it to combine the two phases to create a single smooth consistency. It is used as a thickener and film-forming agent: It is commonly found in moisturizers, sunscreens, cleansers and anti-aging skin care in general.

name: Alcohol
description: Alcohol, also called ethanol, is a colorless liquid with a strong odor. It is used in cosmetics for its antimicrobial properties with a broad spectrum (antifungal, antiviral and antibacterial). It is also used in many other cases as a preservative, solvent or to reduce perspiration in deodorants.Although it is not regulated in cosmetics, many cases of possible irritation are nonetheless reported with alcohol (skin, mucous membrane, lung, eyes ...).

name: Algin
description: Sodium alginate is extracted from brown marine algae. It is in the form of a white and odorless powder, used in cosmetics for its gelling properties (which gives consistency to products). It comes in particular in the composition of Gaviscon, which in contact with citric acid forms a gel that limits heartburn.

name: Alcohol Denat.
description: Denatured alcohol is an alcohol rendered unfit for consumption in order to avoid excise duties (indirect tax levied for example on alcohol, tobacco, or petroleum products) so that it can not be used to create "drinkable alcohols".In cosmetics, it provides a feeling of freshness (aftershave, deodorants or perfumes). It is also used in organic products with essential oils to avoid the use of a preservative and has interesting properties (astringent, solvent ...).Since 1 August 2017, Europe has imposed a very precise denaturing procedure:+ 3 liters of IPA (Isopropyl alcohol / CAS No. 67-63-0)+ 3 liters MEK (methyl ethyl ketone (butanone) / CAS no 78-93-3)+ 1 g of Denatium benzoate (Denatonium benzoate / CAS No. 3734-33-6) must be used per hectolitre of ethanol (pure alcohol).Denat alcohol. is not recommended for very sensitive skin like baby's skin. It can be irritating and tend to dry out the skin.
note: Low penalty in all categories. Происхождение: Vegetal.

name: Allantoin
description: Allantoin comes in the form of a white crystalline powder. It is a nitrogenous compound that is found both in the plant environment (Comfrey root for example) or animal (in the urine of calves). It can also be obtained synthetically from uric acid. In cosmetics, allantoin is used for its astringent, anti-irritant, anti-inflammatory, healing and moisturizing properties. It is also used in the treatment of dentin hypersensitivity. Allantoin is not authorized in organic in France.
note: Считается безопасным для использования в косметике. Происхождение: Vegetal.

name: Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice
description: Aloe Vera gel is contained in the leaves of the plant of the same name. To extract it, simply make a cut at the end and press on it. This gel must be stabilized fairly quickly since in contact with oxygen it degrades rapidly. Aloe Vera Gel has a PH close to that of the skin (4,5), it is an excellent moisturizer, it promotes its elasticity and prevents skin aging. For the scalp, it would help collagen production and delay alopecia (hair loss). Several studies have also shown its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial properties, promoting healing, the treatment of canker sores, gingivitis or oral lichen planus.
note: Считается безопасным для использования в косметике. Происхождение: Vegetal.

name: Alumina
description: Alumina, also known as aluminum oxide, is a naturally occurring mineral found in bauxite. It is a material that has been used for over 40 years for the development of prostheses (including those of the hip). It is also used in dental implants. It is used in whitening type toothpastes as an abrasive agent and thus promotes the removal of dental plaque by friction (with the toothbrush). It is also used for its absorbing properties and its waterproof nature. It also functions as an anti-caking and absorbing agent. It is found in many make-up products such as blush, powder foundation, lipstick and facial cleanser. It is authorized in organic.
note: Считается безопасным для использования в косметике. Происхождение: Mineral.

description: Alpha-terpinene is an aromatic compound naturally present in many essential oils, such as cardamom oil (Elettaria cardamomum) or marjoram oil (Origanum majorana). It is a regulated allergen in Europe.

name: Aluminum Hydroxide
description: Aluminum hydroxide is a form of aluminum used in cosmetic compositions. Unlike aluminum salts, which can penetrate as far as the organs, this ingredient is considered chemically inert. It is used for its emollient and softening properties.
note: Считается безопасным для использования в косметике. Происхождение: Synthetic.

name: Aluminum Chlorohydrate
description: Discovered in 1947, aluminum chlorohydrate has made the antiperspirants previously based on aluminum chloride, less irritating. Nevertheless, this aluminum salt is suspected to be an endocrine disruptor.For the time being, no study proves any relationship between breast cancer in women and aluminum salt. However, it is known that this salt crosses the barriers of the skin, and then end up in different organs: for example in the brain and in particular the hippocampus. It is forbidden in organic.In 2011, the Afssaps (now ANSM) proposed a restriction of the aluminum concentration to 2% in antiperspirants or deodorants. This recommendation has never been followed by Europe.In addition Afssaps recommended not to use antiperspirants containing aluminum on damaged skin, freshly shaved or shaved for example.
note: Рекомендуется избегать в косметических продуктах. Происхождение: Synthetic.

name: Aluminum Starch Octenylsuccinate
description: This aluminium salt is produced by reacting octenylsuccinic anhydride with starch. It is used in cosmetics as an anti-caking agent, a viscosity enhancer (flow resistance) and an absorbent. It is found in products such as lotions and make-up powders. For example, it can prevent foundation from settling on the skin or reduce the oily shine associated with certain lotions. In dry shampoos, it supports the action of a starch, usually rice starch.Although aluminium is considered to be neurotoxic, no study has demonstrated the toxicity of this salt in cosmetics. Note that it is not used in antiperspirants.
note: Требует осторожности при использовании. Происхождение: Vegetal.

name: Amodimethicone
description: Amodimethicone is a silicone derivative of dimethicone, used mainly in shampoos and hair care for its electrostatic properties. It makes the hair soft, easy to comb and shiny. The advantage of this silicone compared to dimethicone is that, although it is difficult to remove with a shampoo, it prevents other polymers of the same type can "re-deposit" on itself, so the decriated accumulation with dimethicone, which makes hair heavy, no longer exists here.Just like dimethicone, the molecule does not pose any particular problem on human health (directly in any case). However, it is not very biodegradable and its impact on the planet both from the point of view of its manufacture and its rejection in the wild is not negligible.
note: Требует осторожности при использовании. Происхождение: Synthetic.

name: Ammonium Hydroxide
description: Ammonia is mostly used for hair coloring acting as an alkaline agent. It allows to open the scales of the cuticle of the hair, which then facilitates the permanent coloring. Ammonia is an aqueous solution produced from ammonia gas.The substance is toxic to the environment.
note: Требует осторожности при использовании. Ингредиент регулируется в ЕС и Великобритании. Происхождение: Synthetic.

name: Ammonium Lauryl Sulfate
description: Ammonium laurylsulphate or ALS is an anionic surfactant. It is therefore widely used in shower gels and shampoos. It seems that it is a little less irritating than its false brother SLS (Sodium Lauryl Sulphate). It is authorized in organic.
note: Low penalty in all categories. Происхождение: Vegetal.

description: This odorous molecule is one of the allergens regulated by Europe. It is found naturally in anise, cumin, tomatoes, and honey. It can be produced synthetically in laboratories.

name: Arctium Lappa Root Extract
description: Burdock root has been used for hundreds of years in traditional medicine or for its nutritional qualities (it is consumed in China, it is rich in fiber and is also known for its aphrodisiac properties). In dermatology, it is used for the treatment of acne or against seborrheic dermatitis. In cosmetics, Burdock is used as a binder and humectant.
note: Считается безопасным для использования в косметике. Происхождение: Vegetal.

name: Aqua
description: Water is the most used ingredient in cosmetics: 83% of products contain it (percentage established from 50,000 products from the Inci Beauty App). Since water is of mineral origin, it can never be certified organic. This is why organic labels, to certify products, authorize fairly low minimums of organic ingredients (10% for Ecocert) on the total of a formula, taking into account that the presence of non-organic water is essential and often the majority in many cases.
note: Считается безопасным для использования в косметике. Происхождение: Mineral.

name: Arginine
description: Arginine is one of those essential amino acids that our body can not do without, especially for the synthesis of proteins. For example, it is used by the body to synthesize nitric oxide and creatine. Arginine is known to promote hair growth. You will find in many care curbing the hair loss and increasing their resistance.
note: Считается безопасным для использования в косметике. Происхождение: Vegetal.

name: Ascorbic Acid
description: Better known as Vitamin C, ascorbic acid is used in cosmetics for its antioxidant properties. It is found quite regularly in anti-aging active ingredients, since it protects cells from damage caused by free radicals and evens out the complexion. It is also present in many other skincare products for these properties.It is present in its natural form in fruits and vegetables (lemons, oranges, kiwis, etc.)
note: Считается безопасным для использования в косметике. Происхождение: Vegetal.
